case_title: COLLEEN WOON VS. AMBERT LOCHELLE BRANDT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOON, COLLEEN SERVED NOV-06-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDT, AMBERT LOCHELLE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-05-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION; EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
